question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/repository/TopicMessageRepository.java -> Scope: '] [Function: prune(long consensusTimestamp)] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the lack of caller identity validation in prune() to impersonate the retention scheduler and trigger out-of-schedule pruning, disrupting the expected data lifecycle and causing consumers to miss messages?
